## Operations

## Add

`<netsuite:add>`

Creates a new record.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The record type for the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The message to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT
- NETSUITE:USER_ERROR

## Add List

`<netsuite:add-list>`

Creates one or more new records.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The record type for the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The add list request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:MAX_RCRDS_EXCEEDED
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

## Async Add List

`<netsuite:async-add-list>`

An asynchronous request equivalent to Add List operation.

In asynchronous requests, your client application sends a request to the SuiteTalk platform, which
places it in a processing queue and handles it asynchronously with other requests. All available
jobs for each polling period are processed contiguously, with no waiting period for an available
job.

Once a job is initiated, NetSuite returns a job ID in the web services response. Your client
application can check the status and result of the request by referencing the job ID.

> [!NOTE] Asynchronous request job IDs are valid for 30 days.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The record type for the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The Async Add List request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:ASYNC_FAULT
- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:MAX_RCRDS_EXCEEDED
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

## Async Delete List

`<netsuite:async-delete-list>`

An asynchronous request equivalent to the Delete List operation.

In asynchronous requests, your client application sends a request to the SuiteTalk platform, which
places it in a processing queue and handles it asynchronously with other requests. All available
jobs for each polling period are processed contiguously, with no waiting period for an available
job.

Once a job is initiated, SuiteTalk returns a job ID in the web services response. Your client
application can check the status and result of the request by referencing the job ID.

> [!NOTE] Asynchronous request job IDs are valid for 30 days.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The Async Delete List request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:ASYNC_FAULT
- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:MAX_RCRDS_EXCEEDED
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

## Async Get List

`<netsuite:async-get-list>`

An asynchronous request equivalent to the Get List operation.

In asynchronous requests, your client application sends a request to the SuiteTalk platform, which
places it in a processing queue and handles it asynchronously with other requests. All available
jobs for each polling period are processed contiguously, with no waiting period for an available
job.

Once a job is initiated, SuiteTalk returns a job ID in the web services response. Your client
application can check the status and result of the request by referencing the job ID.

> [!NOTE] Asynchronous request job IDs are valid for 30 days.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The Async Get List request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:ASYNC_FAULT
- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:MAX_RCRDS_EXCEEDED
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

## Async Initialize List

`<netsuite:async-initialize-list>`

An asynchronous request equivalent to the Initialize List operation.

In asynchronous requests, your client application sends a request to the SuiteTalk platform, which
places it in a processing queue and handles it asynchronously with other requests. All available
jobs for each polling period are processed contiguously, with no waiting period for an available
job.

Once a job is initiated, SuiteTalk returns a job ID in the web services response. Your client
application can check the status and result of the request by referencing the job ID.

> [!NOTE] Asynchronous request job IDs are valid for 30 days.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The Async Initialize List request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:ASYNC_FAULT
- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:MAX_RCRDS_EXCEEDED
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

## Async Search

`<netsuite:async-search>`

An asynchronous request equivalent to the Search operation.

In asynchronous requests, your client application sends a request to the SuiteTalk platform, which
places it in a processing queue and handles it asynchronously with other requests. All available
jobs for each polling period are processed contiguously, with no waiting period for an available
job.

Once a job is initiated, SuiteTalk returns a job ID in the web services response. Your client
application can check the status and result of the request by referencing the job ID.

> [!NOTE] Asynchronous request job IDs are valid for 30 days.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Key</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The type of search that renders the output metadata.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The Async Search request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body Fields Only</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Returns the information in the recordâs body fields only, which significantly improves performance. Fields in associated lists or sublists are not returned. If you set this field to <code>false</code>, all fields associated with the record are returned.</p></td><td><p>true</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Return Search Columns</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>If <code>true</code>, only search columns are returned in your search.</p></td><td><p>true</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum amount of results per page.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:ASYNC_FAULT
- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:MAX_RCRDS_EXCEEDED
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

## Async Update List

`<netsuite:async-update-list>`

An asynchronous request equivalent to the Update List operation.

In asynchronous requests, your client application sends a request to the SuiteTalk platform, which
places it in a processing queue and handles it asynchronously with other requests. All available
jobs for each polling period are processed contiguously, with no waiting period for an available
job.

Once a job is initiated, SuiteTalk returns a job ID in the web services response. Your client
application can check the status and result of the request by referencing the job ID.

> [!NOTE] Asynchronous request job IDs are valid for 30 days.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The record type for the operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The Async Update List request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. ## Async Upsert List

`<netsuite:async-upsert-list>`

An asynchronous request equivalent to the Upsert List operation.

In asynchronous requests, your client application sends a request to the SuiteTalk platform, which
places it in a processing queue and handles it asynchronously with other requests. All available
jobs for each polling period are processed contiguously, with no waiting period for an available
job.

Once a job is initiated, SuiteTalk returns a job ID in the web services response. Your client
application can check the status and result of the request by referencing the job ID.

> [!NOTE] Asynchronous request job IDs are valid for 30 days.

## Attach

`<netsuite:attach>`

Defines a relationship between two records.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attach Ref Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The attach reference type.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The attach request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Change Email

`<netsuite:change-email>`

Changes the email address for the account.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>New Email</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Your new email address.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Current Credentials</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Your current credentials.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Just This Account</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether to change this account only.</p></td><td><p>true</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSION
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT
- NETSUITE:USER_ERROR

## Change Password

`<netsuite:change-password>`

Changes the password for the account.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>New Password</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The new password.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Current Password</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Your current credentials.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSION
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT
- NETSUITE:USER_ERROR

## Check Async Status

`<netsuite:check-async-status>`

Checks whether a particular asynchronous job finished processing.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Job Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the job.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:ASYNC_FAULT
- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

## Delete

`<netsuite:delete>`

Delete one or more record instances. Not all records can be deleted. For more information, see the
NetSuite documentation.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The delete request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Ref Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines the ComplexType of the record.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines the Type of the record.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT
- NETSUITE:USER_ERROR

## Delete List

`<netsuite:delete-list>`

Deletes one or more records. Not all records can be deleted. For more information, see the NetSuite
documentation.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The delete list request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Ref Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines the ComplexType of the record.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines the Type of the record.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:MAX_RCRDS_EXCEEDED
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

## Detach

`<netsuite:detach>`

Deletes a relationship between two records.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Detach Ref Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines the ComplexType of the record for the detach request.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The detach request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Get

`<netsuite:get>`

Retrieves a record by providing the unique ID that identifies the record.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Ref Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines the ComplexType of the record.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines the Type of the record.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT
- NETSUITE:USER_ERROR

## Get Account Governance Info

`<netsuite:get-account-governance-info>`

Get the account concurrency limit and the unallocated concurrency limit.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Get All

`<netsuite:get-all>`

Retrieves a list of all records of the specified type.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The get All request to complete.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

## Get Async Result

`<netsuite:get-async-result>`

Returns the result of the specified job if it finished processing.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Job Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the job.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page Index</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The page number of the asynchronous result.</p></td><td><p>1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:ASYNC_FAULT
- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

## Get Budget Exchange Rate

`<netsuite:get-budget-exchange-rate>`

Gets and filters all data related to the Budget Exchange Rates table. This table maintains exchange
rates between the root-parent and child subsidiaries for use in the budgeting process.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The Get Budget Exchange Rate request, which contains a budgetExchangeRateFilter.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:MAX_RCRDS_EXCEEDED
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

## Get Currency Rate

`<netsuite:get-currency-rate>`

Gets the exchange rate between two currencies based on the specified certain date.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Message</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Accepts the argument CurrencyRateFilter, which specifies what to return in the results.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings for this operation.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetsuiteSoapAttributes">Netsuite Soap Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- NETSUITE:CONNECTIVITY
- NETSUITE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSION
- NETSUITE:INVALID_VERSION
- NETSUITE:MAX_RCRDS_EXCEEDED
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_ERROR
- NETSUITE:NETSUITE_SOAP_FAULT
- NETSUITE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- NETSUITE:SESSION_TIMED_OUT

### Parameters

## Get Data Center Urls

`<netsuite:get-data-center-urls>`

Obtains the NetSuite data center URL for the account.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Account Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The account ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output.
